transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Dana Whitfield. I'm not looking to book anything yet — I just want a price to replace the shingles on my detached garage. It's about 400 square feet, asphalt. Can you put together a written estimate I can review? Dispatcher: Absolutely, Dana. We can prepare a quote for a 400 square foot asphalt shingle replacement and send it over for you to look at. Customer: Perfect, no need to schedule a visit yet, just the estimate please.

expected_entities.issue: Shingle replacement quote for detached garage
expected_entities.request: Written estimate only, no appointment yet
